case_title: ALEX KOROTKOFF VS. REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA DBA UCSF et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING DEC-15-2015 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-16-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-15-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-30-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-19-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-30-2014 CONTINUED TO FEB-10-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-30-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-10-2015 CONTINUED TO APR-14-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-10-2015 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-14-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-16-2015 CONTINUED TO SEP-15-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-15-2015 CONTINUED TO DEC-15-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-15-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-10-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ALEX KOROTKOFF FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-14-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-01-2015. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ALEX KOROTKOFF FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-10-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-26-2015. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-14-2015 CONTINUED TO JUN-16-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ALEX KOROTKOFF FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-16-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-06-2015. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
